heading: Requirement of initial referendum
label: 6413 Requirement of initial referendum
notes: Amendments1996—Subsec. (b)(2). substituted “fluid milk processors voting in the referendum;” for “all processors;”.Pub. L. 104–127
amendments: Amendments1996—Subsec. (b)(2). substituted “fluid milk processors voting in the referendum;” for “all processors;”.Pub. L. 104–127

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Within the 60-day period immediately preceding the effective date of an order issued under , the Secretary shall conduct a referendum among fluid milk processors to ascertain whether the order shall go into effect.section 6405(a) of this title
by at least 50 percent of fluid milk processors voting in the referendum; and

by fluid milk processors voting in the referendum that marketed during the representative period, as determined by the Secretary, 60 percent or more of the volume of fluid milk products marketed by fluid milk processors voting in the referendum;

children.heading: Costs of referendum
children.label: c Costs of referendum
children.text: The Secretary shall be reimbursed from any assessments collected by the Board for any expenses incurred by the Department in connection with the conduct of any referendum under this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Referenda conducted pursuant to this chapter shall be conducted in a manner determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Advance registration
children.label: 2 Advance registration
children.text: A fluid milk processor who chooses to vote in any referendum conducted under this chapter shall register with the Secretary prior to the voting period, after receiving notice from the Secretary concerning the referendum under paragraph (4).

children.heading: Voting
children.label: 3 Voting
children.text: A fluid milk processor who votes in any referendum conducted under this chapter shall vote in accordance with procedures established by the Secretary. The ballots and other information or reports that reveal or tend to reveal the vote of any processor shall be held strictly confidential.

children.heading: Notice
children.label: 4 Notice
children.text: The Secretary shall notify all processors at least 30 days prior to a referendum conducted under this chapter. The notice shall explain the procedure established under this subsection.
